title: funcy's more wandering trader trades
description: A simple fabric mod that adds 70+ new minecraft trades for wandering traders!
body:
![logo](https://i.imgur.com/t3XCqdy.png)

**THIS MOD REQUIRES Fabric API! [Download here](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**
Also, you will require fabric loader 1.16.3+

Introducing funcy's more wandering trader trades mod for your Minecraft experience: With this game-changing mod, I have transformed the Wandering Trader into a must-traded merchant with over 70 new, invaluable trades. Imagine trading with a roving vendor to get your hands on some of the rarest and most coveted items in the game!


I would appreciate it if you support me for my hard work by [donating](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/funcybeardev) any amount 💖💖


<details>
<summary>A few trades </summary>
  
- 4 Emeralds for 32 carrots
- 28 Emeralds for key trial
- 46 Emeralds for Totem of undying!

1.0.8 - Update - Added better trading options from the brand new snapshot (25w07a)!

- Water bukkit (1) -> 4 emeralds, Max 3 trades
- Milk bukkit (1) -> 6 emeralds, Max 4 trades
- Ferminated Spider Eye (1) -> 8 emeralds, Max 8 trades
- Baked Potato (4) -> 2 emeralds, Max 4 trades
- Hay block (1) -> 4 emeralds, Max 4 trades

</details>


# Modpack

Yes, you can add this mod to your modpack without my permission, however **you may not** claim this mod as "yours" or modify the mod for your own needs. Feel free to message me on [discord](https://discord.gg/CQ9BfSKjy8) and I might make it as a feature that everybody would love! 

I would appreciate it if you credited me in your modpack or [donated](https://paypal.me/funcybeardev) me!


# Legal
This plugin or mod is under the linsence of ARR (all rights reserved) meaning **I do not** grant permission to edit the plugin/mod or distribute it without explicit authorization.
